creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Please note that PR ports/136421 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I approve vidalia-0.1.14-jobsafe.diff. Thanks, Shane.

I can't properly test the MAKE_JOBS_SAFE change here,
but if it works for you guys, I'm fine with it.

Fabian
